title: Golden Crispy Slovakian Pork Hash
description: A winey, crispy, and savory Slovakian dish featuring Dutch stroop and rest-meat, perfect for a diabetic-friendly brunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Dice the pork shoulder into small cubes and season with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the pork until browned.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the red wine to the skillet and cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced.
Stir in the Dutch stroop and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the pork mixture to a baking dish and bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Golden Crispy Slovakian Pork Hash hot and enjoy.
